headline: Mizuho Raises its Price Target on Xcel Energy (XEL) to $94
summary: Xcel Energy Inc. (NASDAQ:XEL) is one of the 15 Best Power Generation Stocks To Buy For Data Center Demand. On May 1, 2026, Mizuho analyst Anthony Crowdell raised the firm’s price target on Xcel Energy Inc. (NASDAQ:XEL) to $94 from $86 previously and maintained an Outperform rating on the shares. On April 30, 2026, Xcel […]
